name: Grino Ecologic, S.A.
summary: Gri√É¬±√É¬≥ Ecologic, S.A. provides environmental and waste treatment services in Spain. Its environmental services include custom, collection, and transportation; high pressure industrial cleaning; and management of urban and industrial waste. The company also operates waste treatment centers that offer transfer, sorting and recycling, composting, fuel production, disposal, and hazardous waste and energy recovery services. In addition, it generates energy from waste through energy recovery plants, diesel recovery plants, and gas plants. The company was founded in 1933 and is based in Lleida, Spain.
